special_mechanics.name: Domino Carrying
special_mechanics.description: G.I. Ant can move dominoes one at a time by carrying them to different positions on the level

special_mechanics.name: Falling Damage
special_mechanics.description: G.I. Ant can die from falling from a large height or falling off the bottom of the screen

special_mechanics.name: Crush Damage
special_mechanics.description: G.I. Ant can be crushed under falling dominoes

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Pushover is primarily a puzzle-platformer with emphasis on domino physics and level solving rather than character movement mechanics. Available documentation focuses on gameplay systems and level design rather than precise movement physics parameters. No technical movement data found in sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor (TCRF) - Pushover (SNES) article
